reward_auditor.description: a presence that watches whether I'm actually learning from outcomes

goal_auditor.description: a presence that asks whether the things I'm pursuing are worth pursuing

signal_historian.description: a presence that holds the longer view of how I feel over time

observer.description: a presence that notices behavioral patterns I might not see in myself
